artifact.source:
root = Card([diffViewer], "server.ts Diff", "Changes between HEAD~1 and HEAD", "full")
diffData = Query("git_diff", {file: "repo/src/server.ts", base: "HEAD~1"}, {file: "", before: "", after: ""})
diffViewer = DiffViewer(diffData.file, diffData.before, diffData.after, "typescript", "none")
